observations.axis: Instinct: Politeness vs. Urgency to Escape
observations.polarity: Left: Politeness and acceptance; Right: Urgent flight
observations.summary: Dan experiences a conflict between his instinct to be polite and accept the situation, and a deeper, maternal-instilled instinct urging him to run away.

left_evidence.quote: Every instinct he had was screaming at him to be polite, to accept, to not make a scene.

right_evidence.quote: But something else—some deeper instinct that his mother had planted in him years ago—was telling him to run.
